long_description:
[Acadia-SRE]-Unscheduled Daemonset Pods [ALL-PROD] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/control_plane/sysdig_alerts/unscheduled_daemonset_pods.md
TIP Situation: Observed service-error-unscheduled_daemonset_pods issue in Acadia-Kube
TIP Short Description: daemonset pods are not scheduled
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-volume-acadia:::mzone717-zonelet01:microservice: 
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:

Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone717-zonelet01' and kube_daemonset_name = 'acadia-agent'

Time:             12/03/2025 08:04 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
